recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A family find themselves terrorized by their eight-year-old son's imaginary friend.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: M3GAN
recommendations.overview: A brilliant toy company roboticist uses artificial intelligence to develop M3GAN, a life-like doll programmed to emotionally bond with her newly orphaned niece. But when the doll's programming works too well, she becomes overprotective of her new fri

recommendations.title: Christmas Evil
recommendations.overview: Garbed in his red suit, Harry, a toy factory worker, decides that the only thing he can do to save the spirit of Christmas is to become Santa Claus himself and make all of the naughty townspeople pay... in blood!

recommendations.title: Slumber
recommendations.overview: A sleep doctor tries to protect a family from a demon that feeds on people in their nightmares.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Mark
recommendations.overview: An exorcist priest meets a family that has a daughter who is pursued by a demon.

recommendations.title: Dolly Dearest
recommendations.overview: An American family moves to Mexico to fabricate dolls, but their toy factory happens to be next to a Sanzian grave and the toys come into possession of an old, malicious spirit.

recommendations.title: Tailgate
recommendations.overview: A cocksure, road-raging family man finds himself pursued and terrorized by the vengeful van driver he chooses to tailgate.

recommendations.title: The 4th Floor
recommendations.overview: A woman inherits a rent-controlled apartment and is terrorized by a neighbor.

recommendations.title: Home for Rent
recommendations.overview: When her good tenants go bad, a landlord finds herself terrorized by a cult that seemingly has her husband enthralled — and her daughter in its sights.
